name: Sunrise Popovers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Place eight 6-oz custard cups on a large baking sheet.
3. Spoon 1 1/2 tsp of shortening into the bottom of each custard cup and set aside.
4. In a large bowl, combine the flour and salt.
5. Gradually stir in the milk and water until well blended.
6. Beat in the eggs, one at a time, beating until smooth after each addition.
7. Fold in the shredded cheddar cheese.
8. Place the baking sheet with the custard cups in the preheated oven for 3 to 5 minutes until the shortening melts and the custard cups are hot.
9. Fill the custard cups 1/2 to 2/3 full with the batter.
10. Bake for 45 minutes in the preheated oven, without opening the oven door, until the popovers rise and turn golden brown.
11. If not golden brown after 45 minutes, bake for an additional 5 minutes.
12. Serve piping hot.
